title: AIIMS Guwahati Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) Project Nurse II Notification 2026 has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Guwahati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Guwahati Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation is admissible as per Govt of India guidelines.

qualification.details: Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course with a minimum second class or equivalent CGPA. Desirable Qualification/Experience: Research experience, Computer knowledge.

salary_details.details: Rs. 20,000/- (plus HRA as applicable) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Guwahati Project Nurse II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Guwahati Project Nurse II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Nurse II position at AIIMS Guwahati is 02-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches them before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course with a minimum second class or equivalent CGPA. Research experience and computer knowledge are considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse II position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse II role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data along with self-attested copies of all required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse II position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Guwahati.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Guwahati located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
